template_source: none; bootstrap task created before skill-owned templates were finalized

scope.target: Inventory workflow governance, skill ownership, templates, IDs, timestamps, report routing, and recent AI-context workflow provenance.
constraints: Do not inspect product source or tests.
Do not modify historical workflows until provenance is established.
Use git-backed evidence for chronology and ownership.

steps: Inventory canonical policies, skills, wrappers, guides, templates, and scripts.
Establish the chronology and current status of recent AI-context workflows.
Produce an affected-file and migration map.
validation: All active references are found with rg -uu.
Workflow chronology includes commit timestamps and paths.

results.summary: Inventoried active policies, canonical skills, wrappers, guides, templates, scripts, 21 workflow directories, and Git-backed chronology for the morning audit reports.
evidence: 17 of 21 existing workflow directories use month-only IDs; 4 already use full dates.
The morning baseline report was first tracked in 3a11df7 and the zh-TW derived report in 648f920.
The baseline is final but AIC-001 through AIC-009 remediation remains pending.
